user.description: Enter the Bluetooth MAC address of your Tuya BLE lock.

choose_method.title: Setup Method
choose_method.description: How would you like to set up {name}?

cloud_login.title: Tuya Cloud Credentials
cloud_login.description: Enter your Tuya Smart or Smart Life app credentials. These are used to fetch encryption keys and device info.

standalone.title: Standalone Pairing
standalone.description: Select your lock model and enter Tuya credentials to fetch the auth key. Device UUID: {uuid}

manual_auth.title: Manual Auth Key
manual_auth.description: Paste the device auth key (hex string).

pair.title: Pairing
pair.description: Pairing with the lock... Please wait. Ensure the lock is in pairing mode.

existing_credentials.title: Device Already Paired
existing_credentials.description: This lock is already bound from a previous pairing. Enter the existing login key and virtual ID, or factory reset the lock and try again.

error.auth_key_failed: Could not retrieve encryption key from Tuya cloud.
error.pairing_failed: BLE pairing failed. Ensure the lock is in pairing mode.
error.device_not_found: Device not found. Ensure it is powered on and nearby.
error.no_uuid: Could not determine device UUID from BLE advertisement. Try cloud setup or paste auth key manually.
